name: Figma Context MCP
description: MCP server exposing Figma designs to AI coding agents — read layout, styles, and component structure for one-shot design-to-code. 14k GitHub stars.

skills.name: Design Context Fetch
skills.description: Retrieve Figma frame layouts, component hierarchy, and style data for any node or selection in your file.

skills.name: Image Download
skills.description: Download Figma images and assets directly into your project directory for design-to-code workflows.

skills.name: Design-to-Code
skills.description: Feed exact Figma dimensions, colors, and component structure to AI for pixel-accurate UI generation.
